properties.name: wiretap.default-log
properties.description: Toggle the default Spring Boot application log layout (instead of the structured JSON one)

properties.name: wiretap.pretty-print
properties.description: Toggle pretty-printed JSON log output

properties.name: wiretap.file-logging.enabled
properties.description: Toggle writing logs to a file

properties.name: wiretap.file-logging.path
properties.description: Root directory where log files are written

properties.name: wiretap.stacktrace.max-depth
properties.description: Maximum logged stack-trace depth

properties.name: wiretap.stacktrace.max-length
properties.description: Maximum logged stack-trace length (characters)

properties.name: wiretap.async-logging.enabled
properties.description: Wrap built-in CONSOLE/FILE-ROLLING appenders in a Logback AsyncAppender. Recommended for high-throughput WebClient workloads.

properties.name: wiretap.async-logging.queue-size
properties.description: Maximum number of events held in the async queue.

properties.name: wiretap.async-logging.never-block
properties.description: Drop events when the queue is full instead of blocking the producer thread.

properties.name: wiretap.async-logging.discarding-threshold
properties.description: Threshold below which Logback drops TRACE/DEBUG/INFO events as the queue fills. -1 keeps the Logback default (queueSize/5); 0 disables discarding.

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings
properties.description: Body logging settings

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.extra-info-field-name
properties.description: Top-level field name in the log object that holds the user-supplied extra request info

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.enable-body-truncating
properties.description: Toggle truncation of long string fields in inbound/outbound JSON bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.enable-url-masking
properties.description: Toggle URL masking on logged requests

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.max-field-length
properties.description: Maximum string length for fields inside inbound/outbound JSON bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.max-body-length
properties.description: Maximum logged length of inbound/outbound message bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.enable-body-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of request/response bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.exclude-request-patterns
properties.description: URL regex patterns to skip from logging for inbound requests

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.request-headers
properties.description: Names of request headers to log with the HTTP message. Use a single "*" element to log every header from the source; other elements are ignored when "*" is present.

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.response-headers
properties.description: Names of response headers to log with the HTTP message. Use a single "*" element to log every header from the source; other elements are ignored when "*" is present.

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.visibility-settings
properties.description: Application-wide configuration for the RestTemplate logging interceptor

properties.name: wiretap.tracing.propagation.type.b3.enabled
properties.description: Enable the legacy 64-bit B3 trace-id format

properties.name: wiretap.headers.forward-to-mdc
properties.description: Names of inbound headers that are forwarded into MDC under the same key. Override this list to recognise infrastructure-specific correlation headers (e.g. tcs-session-key, eKassir-PointID).

properties.name: wiretap.headers.session-key-header
properties.description: Name of the inbound header whose value is emitted as the session_key field in HTTP access logs.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.enabled
properties.description: Toggle registration of the Wiretap Kafka producer interceptor.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.headers
properties.description: Record header names that are captured and logged. Use a single "*" element to log every header from the record; other elements are ignored when "*" is present.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.exclude-topic-patterns
properties.description: Topic name regex patterns to skip from logging entirely.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.enable-value-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of key and value via KafkaValueMaskingHandler beans.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.enable-headers-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of header values via KafkaHeaderMaskingHandler beans.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.enable-topic-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of the topic name via KafkaTopicMaskingHandler beans.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.message-body-settings.enable-value-masking
properties.description: Toggle per-record value masking (combines with enable-value-masking).

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.message-body-settings.enable-value-truncating
properties.description: Truncate values longer than max-value-length.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.message-body-settings.max-value-length
properties.description: Maximum logged value length before truncation.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.enabled
properties.description: Toggle registration of the Wiretap Kafka consumer interceptor.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.headers
properties.description: Record header names that are captured and logged. Use a single "*" element to log every header from the record; other elements are ignored when "*" is present.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.exclude-topic-patterns
properties.description: Topic name regex patterns to skip from logging entirely.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.enable-value-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of key and value via KafkaValueMaskingHandler beans.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.enable-headers-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of header values via KafkaHeaderMaskingHandler beans.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.enable-topic-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of the topic name via KafkaTopicMaskingHandler beans.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.message-body-settings.enable-value-masking
properties.description: Toggle per-record value masking (combines with enable-value-masking).

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.message-body-settings.enable-value-truncating
properties.description: Truncate values longer than max-value-length.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.message-body-settings.max-value-length
properties.description: Maximum logged value length before truncation.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.TOPIC
properties.description: Include the topic name.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.PARTITION
properties.description: Include the partition (when explicitly pinned on the record).

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.OFFSET
properties.description: Include the broker-assigned offset (failure-ack path only).

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.CLIENT_ID
properties.description: Include the producer client.id.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.GROUP_ID
properties.description: Include the consumer group.id (not used on the producer side).

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.KEY
properties.description: Include the record key.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.VALUE
properties.description: Include the record value.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.HEADERS
properties.description: Include the configured record headers.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.TIMESTAMP
properties.description: Include the record timestamp and timestamp_type.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.DURATION
properties.description: Include the send duration (failure-ack path only).

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.visibility-settings.STATUS
properties.description: Include status/error_class/error_message on delivery failure.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.TOPIC
properties.description: Include the topic name.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.PARTITION
properties.description: Include the partition.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.OFFSET
properties.description: Include the offset.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.CLIENT_ID
properties.description: Include the consumer client.id.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.GROUP_ID
properties.description: Include the consumer group.id.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.KEY
properties.description: Include the record key.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.VALUE
properties.description: Include the record value.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.HEADERS
properties.description: Include the configured record headers.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.TIMESTAMP
properties.description: Include the record timestamp.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.DURATION
properties.description: Unused on the consumer side.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.visibility-settings.STATUS
properties.description: Unused on the consumer side.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings
properties.description: Per-topic overrides; the first regex match wins.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.match-topic-pattern
properties.description: Regex matched against the topic name.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.enable-value-masking
properties.description: Topic-scoped override for value masking.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.enable-headers-masking
properties.description: Topic-scoped override for header masking.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.enable-topic-masking
properties.description: Topic-scoped override for topic masking.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.headers
properties.description: Topic-scoped list of record headers to log. Use a single "*" element to log every header from the record; other elements are ignored when "*" is present.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.message-body-settings.enable-value-masking
properties.description: Topic-scoped override.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.message-body-settings.enable-value-truncating
properties.description: Topic-scoped override.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-producer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.message-body-settings.max-value-length
properties.description: Topic-scoped override.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings
properties.description: Per-topic overrides; the first regex match wins.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.match-topic-pattern
properties.description: Regex matched against the topic name.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.enable-value-masking
properties.description: Topic-scoped override for value masking.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.enable-headers-masking
properties.description: Topic-scoped override for header masking.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.enable-topic-masking
properties.description: Topic-scoped override for topic masking.

properties.name: wiretap.kafka-consumer-interceptor.specific-topic-settings.headers
properties.description: Topic-scoped list of record headers to log. Use a single "*" element to log every header from the record; other elements are ignored when "*" is present.

properties.description: Topic-scoped override.

properties.description: Topic-scoped override.
